### GTM Sales Leader, AMER at [Notion
...
https://www.linkedin.com/company/notionhq)
...
I joined Notion in early 2023 to build and scale the New Business Sales organization in AMER. Over the next two and a half years, my org scaled from fewer than 10 Account Executives to nearly 50 across Commercial, Mid-Market, and Enterprise. This work required close cross-functional partnership to redesign segmentation, hiring and onboarding processes, territory models, and to build durable coaching and career frameworks, enabling rapid growth as we shifted to an AI-first go-to-market strategy. In Q2 FY26, we expanded the sales leadership structure across Commercial and Enterprise while I continued leading the largest revenue segment in AMER as Head of Mid-Market. During this period, the organization I led delivered exceptional revenue growth (>3X YoY growth every year) and strong talent development, with nearly half of the team earning promotions, reflecting a culture of high performance, growth, and internal mobility.

Successful exit to PE fund ✅ Doubled the company’s valuation in 10 months, and successfully led all commercial efforts in connection to taking the company private and the subsequent sale to Copilot Capital May 2024. In July 2023 I was hired to come in and help the two founders of Relesys improve the revenue engine in order to facilitate an attractive take private and subsequent capital raise. I led and rewamped all revenue functions, including revenue operations, sales, SDRs, client success, implementation, design, support, account management, and marketing. To help me accelerate the processesa and deliver high short term impact I brought in a small team of former co-workers whilst also spending 50% of my time with the teams in Europe. During the period we consistently overdelivered on budgets with high forecast accuracy.
